## Epic 7 — GM Tools (#80)

**Dependency:** #32, #43
**Est. Effort:** Medium

### Goal
Design the advancement system — how characters progress through levels, earn DP, and gain reputation.

### Advancement Components
1. **Individual Levels** — Class level progression (1-20)
2. **Development Points** — DP earned per level for skills and talents
3. **Group Reputation** — Party-wide renown (adapted from original's group rep system)
4. **Titles** — Earned honorifics with mechanical benefits
5. **Milestone Events** — Story-driven advancement triggers

### Progression Table (per class)
| Level | DP Earned | Class Feature | Proficiency |
|-------|-----------|---------------|-------------|
| 1 | 3 (starting) | Class feature | — |
| 2 | 2 | — | — |
| 3 | 2 | Subclass/Path | — |
| 4 | 2 | Talent slot | +1 to one attribute (max +2) |
| 5 | 3 | Class feature | — |
| ... | ... | ... | ... |
| 20 | 4 | Capstone | — |

### Tasks
- [ ] Design level progression curve (1-20)
- [ ] Design DP-per-level curve
- [ ] Design attribute increase rules (when/how much)
- [ ] Design group reputation system
- [ ] Design title system (from original PDF)
- [ ] Design milestone advancement option
